task_statement: P2 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: close resume/post-HOLD isolation, explicit disposition, and sensitive-path write commit block/mark through an official build declared graph. Mission: post-HOLD approve/resume must preserve fresh customer run live-tree isolation or fail closed, support must not silently default Link disposition author/action, and sensitive path writes must not reach durable sandbox output commit unblocked/unmarked.
selection_rule: manual graph because P2 combines Link lifecycle disposition, support resume isolation, and sensitive-write commit policy; no preset is assumed adequate

nodes.work_statement:
Design P2 repair boundaries from the P2 phase doc and audit refs. Read current support/operator/onboard.py, run.py, driver.py, walker_resume.py, worktree_sandbox.py, write_observation.py, and relevant checkers. Return design only: Brick/Agent/Link attribution, invariants, checker-first negative probes, candidate files, and reading_scope_map. Required invariants: (1) no silent disposition author/action default on post-HOLD approve/resume; (2) resume path cannot mutate live checkout without equivalent worktree/temp isolation or explicit fail-closed adapter_cwd contract; (3) sensitive-path writes cannot be committed durably unblocked/unmarked; (4) HOLD remains lifecycle, Movement remains forward/reroute. Do not edit files.

STRICT SCOPE: This is phase:P2 only. Do not broaden into P3-P8, provider release, dashboard, pytest honesty, or raw scrub. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. If evidence conflicts, return transition_concern_evidence using current Building ledger-local reason_refs only.

Implement the P2 repair from the design report and phase doc. Start with checker-first negative probes. Scope: support/operator/onboard.py, run.py, driver.py, walker_resume.py, worktree_sandbox.py, write_observation.py and support/checkers/profiles as needed. Required outcomes: approve/resume requires explicit disposition action/author rather than silent defaults; resume/post-HOLD execution is isolated like fresh customer runs or refuses/HOLDs when adapter_cwd/output root isolation contract is unsafe/missing; sandbox output commit blocks or loudly marks observed_sensitive_path_writes for secret/credential/PII/provider-session-like paths; focused checker/profile proves negative probe RED then GREEN; check_profile.py --all, py_compile changed Python, git diff --check. If any implementation gap remains, return transition_concern_evidence targeting brick-6-p2-resume-isolation-disposition-0701a-work. Do not mark whole goal complete.

STRICT SCOPE: This is phase:P2 only. Do not broaden into P3-P8, provider release, dashboard, pytest honesty, or raw scrub. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. If evidence conflicts, return transition_concern_evidence using current Building ledger-local reason_refs only.

Attack P2 implementation. Independently reproduce the pre-fix risk where post-HOLD resume could use unsafe/missing adapter_cwd or where sensitive writes could be committed unblocked/unmarked. Run real checker/profile entry surfaces, py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and inspect changed files. Verify no source truth, success, quality, or Movement authority moved into support. If implementation gap remains, return local transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap targeting brick-6-p2-resume-isolation-disposition-0701a-work.

STRICT SCOPE: This is phase:P2 only. Do not broaden into P3-P8, provider release, dashboard, pytest honesty, or raw scrub. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. If evidence conflicts, return transition_concern_evidence using current Building ledger-local reason_refs only.

Attack Brick/Agent/Link attribution for P2. Verify disposition remains Link/caller/COO lifecycle evidence, support does not choose Movement or invent targets, HOLD is not a Movement literal, adapter_cwd isolation is support mechanics only, and sensitive-write block/mark is publication/integrity guard not source-truth judgment. If boundary gap remains, return local transition_concern_evidence targeting brick-6-p2-resume-isolation-disposition-0701a-work.

STRICT SCOPE: This is phase:P2 only. Do not broaden into P3-P8, provider release, dashboard, pytest honesty, or raw scrub. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. If evidence conflicts, return transition_concern_evidence using current Building ledger-local reason_refs only.

Check P2 evidence integrity. Verify source audit docs were opened, checker outputs are proof-limited support evidence, negative probes cover explicit disposition, resume isolation, and sensitive-write commit block/mark, and no secret/session bodies appear in evidence. Name any missing evidence under missing_evidence/not_proven; do not claim P2 done if only narrow checks ran.

STRICT SCOPE: This is phase:P2 only. Do not broaden into P3-P8, provider release, dashboard, pytest honesty, or raw scrub. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. If evidence conflicts, return transition_concern_evidence using current Building ledger-local reason_refs only.

Synthesize P2 closure. Fan in design, work, code-qa, axis-qa, evidence-qa. Report observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta / parent_goal_delta_status / next_target_candidates. If P2 named outcomes are not closed, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence with current-ledger-local reason_refs and related_boundary_refs ["brick-6-p2-resume-isolation-disposition-0701a-work"]. If closed, transition_concern_evidence null. Do not mark P3-P8 or whole goal complete.
